messages.content: Build a city autocomplete stream in RxJS v7 using switchMap so stale results never overwrite fresher ones.
How do I process a stream of write jobs strictly one-at-a-time in RxJS v7 so they preserve emission order?
Explain briefly how exhaustMap prevents double-submits, then show a typed form-submit stream in RxJS v7.
Write an RxJS v7 pipeline that processes an upload queue with at most 4 in-flight uploads. Constraints: strict types, bounded concurrency, typed result stream.
Build a typed dashboard ViewModel by combining a user stream, a cart stream, and a currency stream in RxJS v7.
Build a parallel page-load in RxJS v7 that fetches the user profile, preferences, and feature flags concurrently and emits a single typed bundle when all three complete.
Explain how zip differs from combineLatest, then show a typed pairing example in RxJS v7.
Write an RxJS v7 stream that stamps each click with the current auth token. Constraints: strict types, the click drives emission (token updates alone do not).
What's the RxJS v7 way to combine three numeric streams into their sum? Show a minimal typed example.
Build a typed counter store in RxJS v7 using a BehaviorSubject. Expose an observable view and increment/decrement methods.
How do I replay the last 3 events to late subscribers in RxJS v7?
Write an RxJS v7 auth state holder. Constraints: typed discriminated union, initial value is anonymous, expose observable-only view, one-shot sync read available for middleware.
Explain when to pick Subject over BehaviorSubject, then implement a small command bus in RxJS v7.
Build a typed recent-notifications stream in RxJS v7 using ReplaySubject with a 5-second window so late subscribers only see recent items.
Build a cached HTTP config loader in RxJS v7 so the network call runs once even with many subscribers.
What's the RxJS v7 way to turn a cold observable hot with a 1-value replay cache? Minimal example.
Explain the difference between cold and hot observables, then show how shareReplay converts one to the other in RxJS v7.

Write an RxJS v7 pipeline that multicasts a slow computed value to many UI widgets. Constraints: compute runs at most once per activation, cached value re-used by subscribers, auto-cleanup when no subscribers.
Build a debounced search-input stream in RxJS v7 that waits 400ms of silence before firing.
What's the RxJS v7 way to sample a drag stream at most every 16ms (≈60fps)?
Explain how auditTime differs from throttleTime, then show a typed example in RxJS v7.
Write an RxJS v7 pipeline that debounces form-field changes and emits only when the value actually changed. Constraints: strict types, 300ms debounce, no duplicate emissions.
Build a v7 HTTP call wrapper that retries up to 3 times with exponential backoff (200ms, 400ms, 800ms).
How do I retry only on network errors (not on 4xx) in RxJS v7?
Explain why v7 prefers retry({ delay }) over retryWhen, then show a typed example.
Write an RxJS v7 retry policy with jittered backoff. Constraints: strict types, up to 5 attempts, base delay 200ms doubled each attempt, plus random 0-100ms jitter.
Build a running-sum stream in RxJS v7 using scan, with a typed accumulator.
What's the RxJS v7 way to fold a finite stream of numbers into a single total emission?
Explain how scan can act like a tiny Redux store, then implement a typed action stream in RxJS v7.
Write an RxJS v7 pipeline that tracks the last 5 log lines. Constraints: typed accumulator as a readonly array, bounded at 5, newest first.
Build an RxJS v7 stream that tracks the running min, max, and latest of a numeric stream.
Build a reusable typed RxJS v7 operator `logAndMap(fn, tag)` that logs each input then maps it.
